creator: timo.schoeler@riscworks.net
text:
after booting, dmesg shows:

acd0: FAILURE - INQUIRY ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x24 ascq=0x00 sks=0x48 0x00 0x01
cd0 at ata5 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
cd0: <PIONEER DVD-RW  DVR-212 1.24> Removable CD-ROM SCSI-0 device 
cd0: 3.300MB/s transfers
cd0: Attempt to query device size failed: NOT READY, Medium not present

How-To-Repeat: reboot.
